proposal.working_title: AI Automation in 2026: Which Workflows to Hand Off First Without Breaking Your Business
proposal.one_line_angle: A 2026 sequencing playbook for service businesses: which workflows to automate first, which to leave human-in-the-loop, and why the order matters more than the tools you pick.
outline_bullets: Why most AI automation projects stall in the wrong place (the diagnostic before the tool selection)
The four workflow tiers and how to score each one for hand-off readiness
A 90-day handoff sequence for a 5-person service business (with the budget envelope and the rollback criteria)

discovery_evidence.gate_rationale: no overlap detected against current inventory
